name: Resin 3D Print Job
description: Workflow for resin (SLA/MSLA) 3D printing - STAFF OPERATED ONLY

steps.description: Confirm patron has completed resin orientation training
steps.notes: Separate training from FDM - resin-specific safety protocols. Phase 2: check training registry

steps.description: Receive file from patron; load into resin slicer
steps.notes: Common resin slicers: Chitubox, Lychee Slicer

steps.description: Configure supports and part orientation; review and agree settings with patron
steps.notes: Support placement critical for resin prints - affects success rate and finish quality

steps.description: Provide estimated print duration and material cost to patron
steps.notes: Duration and resin volume from slicer output

steps.description: Update booking duration in LibCal to match slicer estimate
steps.notes: Phase 2: PATCH request to LibCal API

steps.description: Staff puts on required PPE: nitrile gloves and eye protection
steps.notes: MANDATORY - uncured resin is toxic and can cause skin sensitization

steps.description: Inspect FEP film for damage; confirm integrity BEFORE adding resin to vat
steps.notes: Damaged FEP can cause resin leaks - check BEFORE pouring resin

steps.description: Shake resin bottle thoroughly; pour into vat; level build plate
steps.notes: Resin settles - must shake before use. Level build plate to manufacturer specs

steps.description: Send sliced file to printer; start print job
steps.notes: Transfer via USB or network depending on printer model
Phase 1: show estimated completion time. Phase 2: live countdown timer. Do not open printer during print.

steps.description: Remove build plate; wash printed parts in IPA (isopropyl alcohol)
steps.notes: Wash in 90%+ IPA to remove uncured resin. Use wash station if available.

steps.description: UV cure parts in curing station
steps.notes: Post-cure strengthens parts and fully hardens any remaining resin

steps.description: Remove supports; inspect parts; clean resin vat and build plate. Dispose waste resin per safety protocol
steps.notes: Do NOT pour uncured resin down drain. Follow hazardous waste disposal protocol.

steps.description: Record in ordering log: resin volume, price, patron information
steps.notes: Ordering log is SharePoint/Excel - manual entry, no API access

steps.description: Provide patron with order number for payment at front desk
